items.summary: Gold prices declined on Monday, extending their loss from last week, as an escalating conflict with Iran drove fears of sticky inflation on the back of surging prices of oil, and investors again took shelter in the dollar.

items.headline: Short-term Treasury yields climb as investors fear the surge in oil prices and risk of stagflation
items.summary: The rise in yields reflects inflation fears.

items.headline: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?
items.summary: High inflation and slow growth present a double threat, as measures like interest rate cuts and government spending only aggravate inflation.

items.headline: Iran's strategic oil island thrust into the spotlight as Middle East conflict escalates
items.summary: Kharg Island serves as the centerpiece for Iran's oil industry, accounting for roughly 90% of the country’s crude exports.

items.headline: Oil prices fall below $100 per barrel on possible stockpile release to address supply disruption

items.headline: Anthropic sues Trump administration over Pentagon blacklist
items.summary: The lawsuit says Anthropic is being harmed "irreparably" and could lose hundreds of millions of dollars.

items.headline: K-shaped economy puts pressure on women, as lower pay and higher costs reduce spending
items.summary: Women are under pressure from lower pay and reduced affordability on everyday items, which is widening the K-shaped economy and seeing women spending less.

items.headline: Treasury yields are little changed as traders weigh inflation and recession risks

items.headline: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary: Roughly 20% of global LNG flows through the Strait.

items.summary: “I earn $100, 000 and I’m currently shouldering the mortgage, maintenance — specific to a co-op — and normal kid expenses.”

items.headline: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation reaches settlement with Department of Justice over antitrust concerns

items.headline: Here’s how Amazon just stepped up its robotaxi competition with Tesla and Google

items.summary: Zoox will start by deploying a fleet of retrofitted Toyota Highlander SUVs, before rolling out its toaster-shaped robotaxis for testing.

items.headline: Higher oil prices will push U.S. inflation rate to 3% this year, El-Erian says
items.summary: Higher prices will push inflation upward in 2025, limiting the Federal Reserve’s ability to cushion the soft U.S. labor market, said former Pimco CEO Mohamed El-Erian.

items.headline: Oil prices pull back from highest levels since 2022 on talk of G-7 emergency release of crude reserves
items.summary: Crude prices were surging on Monday amid signs that the Iran conflict wasn’t de-escalating, and as some major oil producers were reportedly forced to cut production.

items.headline: Hims & Hers stock skyrockets 40% as Novo Nordisk ends feud, agrees to sell Ozempic and Wegovy on platform
items.summary: Hims & Hers shares jumped more than 50% in premarket trade on Monday after ending a dispute with Novo Nordisk by striking a partnership with the Danish drug giant.

items.headline: Microsoft has a new Anthropic partnership. Will Claude Cowork offer an AI advantage?
items.summary: Microsoft is evolving its Copilot offering from chatbot to agent through a new arrangement with Anthropic.
